prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `465b7d93`.
codex_response:
Implemented `465b7d93` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: find the hollow `6` frame, remove the detached non-background seed shape, and redraw a structural enlargement of that seed inside the frame interior in the same color. I used the Opus hint as the starting hypothesis; it was consistent with the official examples. There was no Sonnet entry for this task, and no new shared primitive was needed beyond a task-local resize helper.

Files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_465b7d93/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_465b7d93/verifier.py#L6), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_465b7d93/generator.py#L47), and [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_465b7d93/helpers.py#L4). The generator stays on-family by keeping the official `10x10` / background `7` / hollow `6` square setup and sampling a single detached small connected seed motif that gets enlarged into the frame interior.

Validation passed end to end:
- Official examples: `4/4` passed via `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 465b7d93`
- Generated examples: `1000/1000` passed via `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 465b7d93`

Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/465b7d93/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/465b7d93/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/465b7d93/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/465b7d93/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/465b7d93/previews/preview_03.png). No terminal image renderer was available here, so the sanity check was done from sampled built examples in `task.json` plus confirming the preview PNG loads successfully.
